Name: insert_notes
SQL: WITH check_mutation_result AS (SELECT * FROM (SELECT $1::uuid AS "id", $2::uuid AS "author_id", $3::text AS "title" UNION ALL SELECT $4::uuid AS "id", $5::uuid AS "author_id", $6::text AS "title") AS data WHERE data."author_id" = $7::uuid), check_count AS (SELECT CASE WHEN (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM check_mutation_result) >= 2 THEN 1 ELSE (SELECT 0 FROM (SELECT constellation_throw_error('check constraint of an insert/update permission has failed', 'ZZ901')) x) END AS status), mutation_result AS (INSERT INTO "public"."notes" ("id", "author_id", "title") SELECT check_mutation_result."id", check_mutation_result."author_id", check_mutation_result."title" FROM check_mutation_result WHERE (SELECT status FROM check_count) = 1 RETURNING *), nested_replies_data AS (SELECT * FROM (SELECT 0::int AS "_parent_idx", $8::text AS "body" UNION ALL SELECT 0::int AS "_parent_idx", $9::text AS "body" UNION ALL SELECT 1::int AS "_parent_idx", $10::text AS "body") AS data), _nested_replies AS (INSERT INTO "public"."note_replies" ("body", "note_id") SELECT nested_replies_data."body", mr."id" FROM nested_replies_data JOIN (SELECT *, (ROW_NUMBER() OVER ())::int - 1 AS "_parent_idx" FROM mutation_result) AS mr ON mr."_parent_idx"=nested_replies_data."_parent_idx" RETURNING *), nested_replies_post_check AS (SELECT CASE WHEN (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM _nested_replies WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM mutation_result g WHERE _nested_replies."note_id" = g."id" AND g."author_id" = $11::uuid) AND _nested_replies."visibility" = $12::text) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM _nested_replies) THEN 1 ELSE (SELECT 0 FROM (SELECT constellation_throw_error('check constraint of an insert/update permission has failed', 'ZZ901')) x) END AS status), nested_replies AS (SELECT * FROM _nested_replies WHERE (SELECT status FROM nested_replies_post_check) = 1) SELECT json_build_object('affected_rows', ((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM mutation_result) + (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM nested_replies)), 'returning', (SELECT COALESCE(json_agg(row_to_json("_e")), '[]'::json) FROM (SELECT mutation_result."id" AS "id", mutation_result."title" AS "title" FROM mutation_result WHERE (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM nested_replies) IS NOT NULL) AS "_e"))
